column6: notes

23% LOC of upstream minify.js (98 vs 413). Happy-path orchestration only; missing ecma normalization, mangle cache, format/output option resolution, structured error shape, source-map integration. ISS-033, ISS-034. Confirmed unchanged from prior audit.
Thin wrapper around Terser.minifyToString with try/catch fallback. Adapter for ssg-minify JsCompressor SPI. Functionally complete; correctness limited by underlying Terser stubs (ISS-031..ISS-035).

Class/object property nodes — AstObjectProperty hierarchy, AstClass/AstDefClass/AstClassExpression, AstClassStaticBlock, AstPrivateIn. Matches original ast.js DEFNODE definitions. computedKey() correctly differentiates AstSymbolMethod from generic AstNode keys.
Literal/constant nodes complete: AstString, AstNumber, AstBigInt, AstRegExp (with RegExpValue case class), AstNull/NaN/Undefined/Infinity/Hole, AstTrue/False. 1:1 with original.

Variable/constant declaration nodes (Var/Let/Const/Using/VarDef/UsingDef/NameMapping/Import/Export/ImportMeta) complete with walk/childrenBackwards. ArrayBuffer-based imported_names/exported_names match original.

Structural AST equality (equivalent_to) ported as iterative stack walk + shallowCmp via pattern matching. ~50 case branches mirror original equivalent-to.js. nullEq matches original's reference-equality semantics for For init/condition/step. Default case at line 254 is 'true' which is incorrect (should be 'false' for unmatched types) — minor as all real types are listed but worth a follow-up. Audit confirmed; not filing as separate issue (low impact).

Expression nodes complete: Call/New, Sequence, PropAccess hierarchy (Dot/DotHash/Sub), Chain, Unary (Prefix/Postfix), Binary/Assign/DefaultAssign, Conditional, Array/Object, Await/Yield, Template strings. Matches original.

AstNode trait + walk/TreeWalker complete. TreeTransformer is a stub: extends TreeWalker with unused before/after fields, but node.transform() method does not exist. Original transform.js (323 LOC, ~50 def_transform clauses) is entirely unported. Affects GlobalDefs (ISS-058). See ISS-057. Lines 203-206.

AstScope trait + AstToplevel + AstLambda hierarchy (Function/Defun/Arrow/Accessor) + AstDestructuring + AstExpansion. variables/enclosed typed as Any (SymbolDef integration pending — ISS-032). isBraceless and lengthProperty match original.

Size estimator (~329 LOC) covers all major node types via pattern matching. symbolSize correctly assumes 1 char for mangleable symbols. SymbolClassProperty has TODO line 282 ('take propmangle into account') — minor. Compares well against upstream size.js.

Statement nodes complete: Debugger/Directive/SimpleStatement, Block hierarchy (BlockStatement/Switch branches), DWLoop (Do/While), For/ForIn/ForOf, With, If, Switch/Case/Default, Try/TryBlock/Catch/Finally, Jump/Exit/Return/Throw, LoopControl/Break/Continue. Matches original.

Symbol hierarchy complete: AstSymbol trait + Var/Funarg/Const/Using/Let/Catch/DefClass/Class/Defun/Lambda/Method/ClassProperty/PrivateProperty/Import/ImportForeign/Export/ExportForeign/SymbolRef + Label/LabelRef + This/Super + NewTarget. thedef typed as Any pending ISS-032.
AstToken case class with bitfield-backed nlb/quote/templateEnd accessors. Sentinel Empty token. Matches original AST_Token in ast.js.
Intentionally empty placeholder file. AST types live in Ast*.scala siblings.
ISS-116 reflection bug, ISS-130 bestOf/isRefOf/isReachable. makeNodeFromConstant missing bigint+undefined. getSimpleKey incomplete AstConstant dispatch. retainTopFunc decomposed signature.

ISS-117,118,129,139-143. hoist_declarations/hoist_properties missing. find_variable/is_atomic/unsafe_undefined_ref missing. hasDirective inversion bug. 15+ handlers have dropped branches. optimizeBinary/Call/Conditional/Sub/Dot/UnaryPrefix all incomplete.
All 13 items (10 constants + 3 functions) ported correctly. hasFlag returns Boolean vs truthy-int — intentional Scala idiom.

ISS-138. Missing: in_computed_key(), mangle_options(), is_lhs() (on trait), sequences_limit field. in_32_bit_context drops other_operand_must_be_number param. Duplicate ToplevelConfig with CompressorOptions.
ISS-138. Missing ie8, pure_new, warnings options. sequences_limit incomplete. CompressorLike missing in_computed_key, mangle_options, sequences_limit.
ISS-133. dropCall is_callee_pure stubbed. dropClass missing is_self_referential. dropAssign missing use-strict guard. dropUnary missing IIFE negate. AstClassPrivateProperty computed key missing.

ISS-115 CRITICAL walk-not-transform bug, ISS-134 major gaps. drop_funcs/drop_vars missing, assign_as_unused never called, lambda argname trimming absent, scan_ref_scoped absent, AST_Definitions pass 1 missing, fixed_ids missing.

ISS-132. evalSymbolRef complete stub. AST_Function unsafe missing. global_objs/RegExp eval paths missing. isConstantExpression misplaced+incomplete. BigInt guard missing. NaN+AST_With guard missing. typeof+SymbolRef TODO stub.
ISS-136. figure_out_scope TODO stub. deepClone stub. AstChain suffix bug. SymbolRef global check uses reflection.
Re-audited 2026-04-11: ISS-149 and ISS-150 verified fixed. All branches in isModified and isUsedInExpression match original.

ISS-127,128. inlineIntoCall missing body-flattening (~200 LOC, 9 inner helpers). inlineIntoSymbolRef missing 15+ paths including scope safety, recursive refs, size calc. is_const_symbol_short_than_init_value missing.
All data tables + 3 helpers (isPureNativeMethod, isPureNativeFn, isPureNativeValue) ported correctly. make_nested_lookup replaced with idiomatic Scala Map[String,Set[String]].
ISS-126,137. handle_defined_after_hoist (~140 LOC) entirely missing. markEscaped missing AstYield+AstUsingDef. reduceSymbolRef falsy check wrong. reset_def singleUse sentinel wrong.

Re-audited 2026-06-24 (ISS-1114): prior '~35%/collapse_vars missing' STALE. All 5 cited gaps ported vs terser tighten-body.js: collapseVars (:1399, 18 sub-funcs), handleIfReturn 7 patterns (:490), sequenceize2 (:910), joinConsecutiveVars 9 cases (:1226), eliminateDeadCode real loopcontrolTarget (:342). 2636 LOC.
firstInStatement and leftIsObject helpers ported from utils/first_in_statement.js. Pattern matches all leftmost-child cases.

OutputOptions case class with all major options from output.js (asciiOnly, beautify, braces, comments, ecma, indent levels, inlineScript, keep flags, maxLineLen, preamble, preserveAnnotations, quote style, semicolons, shebang, shorthand, webkit, width, wrapIife/wrapFuncArgs).

Re-audited 2026-06-24 (ISS-1114): prior 'getSymbolName ignores mangledName (ISS-059) + no source map (ISS-033)' STALE. printSymbol (:1995) dispatches mangledName||name per output.js:2341 (mangling now affects output); full source-map plumbing (addMapping:454/doAddMapping:393 + sourcemap/SourceMap.scala).
Trivial package object — Version constant only. Not audited as it has no source counterpart.

3173 LOC vs parse.js parse() ~3630 (~87%). Recursive descent parser ported with mutable Parser class. ~96 def methods cover all expression and statement productions. Single 'simplified comment manipulation' note at line 1685 (cosmetic). Outer comment merging differs slightly from original but parse output is correct.
Intentionally empty placeholder file. PRECEDENCE map lives in Token.scala.

Token type constants, keyword/operator/punctuator sets, number format predicates (hex/oct/es6oct/bin/dec/bigint), parseJsNumber, Unicode identifier helpers (isIdentifierStart/Char), surrogate-pair helpers, getFullChar/Length, fromCharCode. Replaces parse.js makePredicate with Set/Map.
1023 LOC, comparable to tokenizer closure in parse.js. Mutable state matches original S object. EofException sentinel replaces JS exception. No TODOs.

552 LOC. Base54 identifier generator, Mangler.mangleNames, formatOptions, expandNames, computeCharFrequency, findCollidingNames all ported. expandNames does mutate orig/references symbol .name fields directly so it works. mangleNames only updates SymbolDef.mangledName — relies on output dispatching to def.mangled_name which is broken in OutputStream (ISS-059). So Mangler runs correctly but produces no output change.

693 LOC. mangleProperties + manglePrivateProperties two-pass walker (collect candidates, then transform). Mutates fields directly via field assignment so it works around the missing TreeTransformer.transform() (ISS-057). builtinNames subset of original DOM property list. Reasonable port.

686 LOC. 4-pass figure_out_scope ported (chain setup, back-references, IE8 catch, Safari loop fix). Module-level mutable state mirrors original. def_variable/def_function/find_variable helpers present. One XXX HACK comment at line 387 carries forward from original.

194 LOC. SymbolDef class with name, orig, init, scope, references, global, exportFlag, mangledName, undeclared, id, chained, directAccess, escaped, recursiveRefs, assignments, replaced, singleUse, fixed, eliminated, shouldReplace. fixedValue/unmangleable/mangle methods. redefinedCatchDef helper. Matches original SymbolDef class scope.js:127-194.
Matches Java; constructor logic preserved
blockNames/tagNames exposed as public def (Java package-private). All else matches.
Date/temporal coercion fragile; asFormattedNumber trailing-zero divergence. ISS-020, ISS-021, gap-analysis §4.2.
Borrowed from SGE; no liqp counterpart. Utility infrastructure.
toPlainString workaround for Native; manual sci-notation removal could diverge from Java BigDecimal in edge cases (negative scale, very large/small).
Matches Java interface structure
State-machine variant of Java's lambda chain — equivalent behavior

Re-audited 2026-06-24 (ISS-1114): prior '14%/missing guards/include_relative broken' STALE. Ported vs liqp Template.java: max-template-size guard (:88), render-time guard (:108), errors() (:67), REGISTRY_ROOT_FOLDER (:177), env-map configurator (:166); 41% ratio (208/504). Remaining: JSON/Inspectable/varargs/ExecutorService render overloads deliberately omitted in DataView mode (no Jackson/reflection/thread-pools); EAGER-no-op by design (eager machinery in TemplateParser).
Missing getDateParser, template field, public checkForMaxIterations. getRootFolder returns Any instead of Path.
Builder missing 7 setters; parse() only String overload; default flavor LIQP→JEKYLL. ISS-012..ISS-014, ISS-030, gap-analysis §4.1.
Reads file content directly instead of returning CharStream. Behavior matches.
Java's getLocationFromCharStream replaced with sourceName field on ResolvedSource. Default and InMemory subtypes added (extension).

Simplified URL handling: isValidAbsoluteUrl is startsWith http://|https://|// only (Java uses URI scheme detection for any scheme). getRelativeUrl drops URI normalization, query/anchor split, toASCIIString encoding, and context.addError on URISyntaxException. objectToMap drops Inspectable LiquidSupport dispatch. Custom schemes (mailto:, ftp:), URLs with unicode or unusual paths, and Inspectable site objects all behave differently.

Intentional rewrite drops Java's '(?<\!^)' look-behind (Native re2 lacks it). Comment claims no leading empty but implementation uses Pattern.quote with limit=-1 which DOES produce leading empty when string starts with delimiter. Minor semantic divergence when input begins with delimiter. Also adds empty-delimiter special case (Array(original)) not in Java.

Intentional rewrite: Java's (?s)-like multi-line regex replaced with manual case-insensitive scanner (removeBlocks for script/style, removeComments, removeTags). Preserves unclosed '<' unlike Java regex which would consume it. Documented for Native re2 compatibility.

matchCondition builds new HashMap copying parent vars and calls render(vars) vs Java's renderUnguarded(singletonMap, context, false): loses parent scope stack for filters/aliases, and truthiness is non-empty/non-'false' vs Java's strict 'true'.equals(res). Subtle divergence when expression renders to values other than 'true'/'false'.

Renderer ported with substitution: Java uses java.net.URL (with MalformedURLException) but URL is unavailable in Scala.js/Native; Scala port substitutes java.net.URI. URL.getFile() returns path+query; the port replicates this with getRawPath + (?+getRawQuery). For typical youtu.be URLs the result equals Java's. Edge: URI parsing is more lenient than URL parsing (URL validates protocol handlers); some malformed inputs that Java rejects may now succeed. The youtu.be branch, www.youtube.com/watch branch, and fallback link branch all match Java otherwise. Note: Cross-platform — URI may itself not be fully available in Scala.js/Native; verify.

Java has 4 constructors + 5 override methods (getFactory, getDefaultValue x2, get, set, toString). Scala has 4 constructors + 3 methods (get, set, toString). Missing overrides: getFactory (returns DataNotNullValueFactory cast), getDefaultValue no-arg, getDefaultValue(holder). These are accessible through inherited vals so functionally equivalent. Constructor for (name, defaultKey) uses defaultKey.defaultValue (matching Java getDefaultValue()). All constructor logic matches.

All 4 methods match: aggregate, aggregateActions, clean, invokeAfterSet. Commented-out invokeBeforeSet preserved. invokeAfterSet returns Nullable[Set[Class[?]]] matching Java @Nullable Set<Class<?>>. No issues.

Java has 3 constructors, 8 methods (getName, getFactory, getDefaultValue x2, get, getFrom, toString, equals, hashCode). Scala has 3 constructors matching, plus 5 methods (getDefaultValue(holder), get, getFrom, toString, equals, hashCode). Missing: getName() and getFactory() accessors - replaced by public val fields (name, factory) which is the SSG convention. getDefaultValue() no-arg version missing as standalone method but accessible via val defaultValue. get() logic equivalent. Minor: toString says NullableDataKey for all subclasses (same as Java original).

Semantic mismatch: Java returns @NotNull T but Scala returns Nullable[T]. The factory is supposed to guarantee non-null but the Scala version allows null through Nullable. Functionally works because callers cast anyway, but the type contract is weaker than original.

Signature differs: Java overrides apply returning @NotNull T with @Nullable DataHolder param. Scala version returns plain T (correct non-null) but takes Nullable[DataHolder]. Does not override the parent apply(DataHolder) - has a different signature with Nullable[DataHolder]. Method overload rather than override.

1:1 match. Java interface extending Function -> Scala trait with apply method. Returns Nullable[T] matching Java @Nullable. No issues.

Simple enum extends java.lang.Enum. Covers Html/Css/Js/Json/Xml — matches jekyll-minifier extension dispatch in output_compressed (.html/.htm via output_html, .xml via output_html, .css via output_css, .js via output_js_or_file, .json via output_json).

Pluggable JS compressor SPI. Single-method trait compress(input: String): String. Lacks options parameter, so user-supplied terser_args (compress/mangle/output/ecma/ie8/safari10) cannot be forwarded to the underlying compressor (ISS-048). jekyll-minifier passes a validated hash to ::Terser.new(args).

Top-level facade. minify() dispatches by FileType but ignores MinifyOptions toggles compressCss/compressJs/compressJson and the exclude list — those fields are dead. ISS-042. fileTypeFromPath covers html/htm/xml/css/js/json. Xml correctly routes through HtmlMinifier (matches jekyll-minifier output_html). No production-environment guard (out of scope for library; aggregator concern).

Aggregate options case class. Fields compressCss/compressJs/compressJson/exclude declared but never read (ISS-042). Missing top-level fields: terserArgs/terserOptions (ISS-048), preservePhp (ISS-043). Otherwise structure mirrors jekyll-minifier CompressionConfig.

Re-verify: confirmed minor_issues. Core whitespace/comment/zero/hex passes correct, string/url() preservation via placeholder is sound. Gaps: ISS-041 (color folding/shorthand collapsing/vendor prefixes/source maps), ISS-046 (enhanced mode), ISS-049 (bang-comment /*\! ... */ preservation). Comment removal is unconditional — strips license headers.

Six boolean flags for the core cssminify2-style passes. Missing entire enhanced CSS option set: css_enhanced_mode, css_merge_duplicate_selectors, css_optimize_shorthand_properties, css_advanced_color_optimization, css_preserve_ie_hacks, css_compress_variables (ISS-046). Related to gem feature gap ISS-041.

Re-verify: confirmed minor_issues. Existing: ISS-038 (preserveLineBreaks dead), ISS-039 (conservative quote-strip char-class), ISS-040 (no SSI/JSP/PHP/CDATA presets). Newly filed: ISS-044 (compress_js_templates), ISS-051 (protocol-removal limited to href/src/action), ISS-052 (removeMultiSpaces only collapses literal ' ' runs, not \s+ — multi-line indented text stays as-is), ISS-049/050 (license-comment preservation). Conditional-comment detection only matches <\!--[if, missing downlevel-revealed forms.

Re-verify: confirmed minor_issues. preserveLineBreaks dead (ISS-038). Missing: preservePhp (ISS-043), compressJsTemplates (ISS-044). All other 18 jekyll-minifier HTML toggles present and named consistently.

Extracts pre/textarea/script/style by case-insensitive scan + user preservePatterns regexes. Sound placeholder mechanism. Gap: fixed preserved-tag set, no svg/math/code/cdata/server-side handling (ISS-053). User must inject regex for any non-default preserved tag.

Re-verify: confirmed minor_issues. Intentional stopgap. State machine handles strings/template-literals/regex-literal context correctly. Real minification via ssg.js.TerserJsCompressor SPI (currently parse+re-emit, ISS-031/032). Additional gap: ISS-050 (license/bang-comment preservation). isRegexContext heuristic is plausible but not exhaustive; acceptable for stopgap.

Two flags only: removeComments, collapseWhitespace. No options for preserve-license-comments, no terser pass-through. Aligned with the intentional-stopgap status of JsMinifier — full Terser config flows through ssg.js.TerserJsCompressor, which itself lacks options wiring (ISS-048).

Pure state-machine JSON minifier. Strips whitespace, // line comments, /* */ block comments outside string literals. Preserves escape sequences inside strings. Matches json-minify gem behavior: that gem is also lenient about JSON-with-comments (JSONC). No options needed.
Package object with Version constant only. Trivial.
